column2: }]}","{""has_bug"": true, ""bugs"": [{""line_start"": 165, ""line_end"": 165, ""description"": ""The line constructs the serial number using the platform name and the node type, which can lead to duplicate serial numbers for multiple tracking references (e.g., multiple Oculus Rift CV1 TrackingReference) causing a dictionary key conflict."", ""buggy_code"": ""currState.serialNumber = ovrProductName + \"" \"" + node
column3: }], ""relevance"": ""The bug report indicates that there is a conflict with serial numbers when binding Rift controllers, which is directly related to how the serial number is constructed in the code. The use of the node type in the serial number can lead to duplicates, as multiple tracking references can share the same identifier.""}"
